attributes.action: Government to broadcast Peoples Emergency Briefing on Climate on mainstream TV
attributes.additional_details: The Climate emergency will affect all of us , with multiple impacts right across society - and people deserve the information to make an informed, scientific based choice
attributes.background: The People's  Emergency briefing on the Climate was aimed at MP's - now take the summary briefing and publicise it to everyone in the UK

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

Decisions about what is shown on TV are a matter for broadcasters, not the UK Government or Parliament.
